TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Butch Beard nalecuhan i Hardinsburg, Kentucky, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Butch Beard i 1969 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 10, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. u siwkay niza u Amilika a tademaw, tatama. u kawaw niza u mimaliay. 5 bulad 5 demiad, 1947 a mihca, Butch Beard, miunduay.
S.PHON: butʦħ bəard nar~ɾəʦuħan i ħardinsburg, kəntuʦkj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. butʦħ bəard i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu atr~ɾanta ħawks putiput. u siwkaj niza u amir~ɾika a tadəmaw, tatama. u kawaw niza u mimar~ɾiaj. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, butʦħ bəard, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Butch Beard nalecuhan i Hardinsburg, Kentucky, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Butch Beard i 1969 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 10, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. u siwkay niza u Amilika a tademaw, tatama. u kawaw niza u mimaliay. 5 bulad 5 demiad, 1947 a mihca, Butch Beard, miunduay.
S.PHON: butʦħ bəard nar~ɾəʦuħan i ħardinsburg, kəntuʦkj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. butʦħ bəard i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu atr~ɾanta ħawks putiput. u siwkaj niza u amir~ɾika a tadəmaw, tatama. u kawaw niza u mimar~ɾiaj. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, butʦħ bəard, miunduaj.
